title: Trump announces naval blockade on Iran after peace talks collapse
snippet: Trump on Truth Social: 'Effective immediately, US Navy will begin BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz.' Complete blockade — all or none. Will interdict vessels that paid Iran tolls. 50% tariff on countries assisting Iran.
tag_reason: Major new event: Trump declares immediate naval blockade of Hormuz following collapse of Islamabad talks. First announcement of 50% tariff threat on Iran-assisting countries.
